name: vibeguard
description: VibeGuard - security diagnostics for AI-generated code

scripts.build: npm run build -w @vibeguard/findings-schema && npm run build -w @vibeguard/rules && npm run build -w @vibeguard/remediation-engine && npm run build -w @vibeguard/sarif-adapter && npm run build -w @vibeguard/analyzer-core && npm run build -w @vibeguard/cli && npm run build -w vibeguard-aicoding && npm run build -w vibeguard-chrome
